id: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector__a2-late-chunking__0000
text: # IT sector is the strongest grower within the TMT sector

metadata.chunk_id: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector__a2-late-chunking__0000

metadata.chunk_id: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector__a2-late-chunking__0003
metadata.source_slug: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector
metadata.source_title: IT sector is the strongest grower within the TMT sector

id: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector__a2-late-chunking__0004
text: The Dutch economy continues to grow strongly and the TMT sector is benefiting. It is mainly IT companies that are showing strong growth, and TV content companies are also on the up. However, the sector shows major differences, and branches such as publishers and printers are struggling.

metadata.chunk_id: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector__a2-late-chunking__0004
metadata.source_slug: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector
metadata.source_title: IT sector is the strongest grower within the TMT sector

metadata.source_title: IT sector is the strongest grower within the TMT sector

id: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector__a2-late-chunking__0006

metadata.chunk_id: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector__a2-late-chunking__0006
metadata.source_slug: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector
metadata.source_title: IT sector is the strongest grower within the TMT sector

id: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector__a2-late-chunking__0007
text: The economic climate is favourable for the TMT sector. The Dutch economy grew by 3.2% in 2017, and in 2018 GDP will increase by 2.9%. The main economic indicators are also positive. Producer confidence and consumer confidence are high, capacity utilisation in industry is high, exports continue to pick up and the number of jobs and vacancies keeps rising.

metadata.chunk_id: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector__a2-late-chunking__0007
metadata.source_slug: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector
metadata.source_title: IT sector is the strongest grower within the TMT sector

id: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector__a2-late-chunking__0008
text: ## Fewer and fewer obstacles in the sector, but labour shortages remain a problem

metadata.chunk_id: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector__a2-late-chunking__0008
metadata.source_slug: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector
metadata.source_title: IT sector is the strongest grower within the TMT sector

id: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector__a2-late-chunking__0009
text: Entrepreneurs in the sector experience fewer obstacles to running their businesses. However, the labour shortage remains a major problem. More than one-fifth of entrepreneurs are severely affected by this. Business confidence in the sector has fallen slightly, but at 13.3 it is still at a high level.

metadata.chunk_id: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector__a2-late-chunking__0009
metadata.source_slug: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector
metadata.source_title: IT sector is the strongest grower within the TMT sector

id: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector__a2-late-chunking__0010
text: ## IT sector is the driving force; publishers, printers and telecoms in the red

metadata.chunk_id: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector__a2-late-chunking__0010
metadata.source_slug: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector
metadata.source_title: IT sector is the strongest grower within the TMT sector

id: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector__a2-late-chunking__0011
text: The IT companies segment, the largest within TMT, continues to grow strongly. Ongoing digitalisation and a favourable economic climate are the reasons for this. Wholesale trade in ICT and TV content companies also benefit from the economic boom. However, there are also segments that are struggling. Publishers, printers and telecoms will also show revenue decline next year.

metadata.chunk_id: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector__a2-late-chunking__0011
metadata.source_slug: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector
metadata.source_title: IT sector is the strongest grower within the TMT sector

id: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector__a2-late-chunking__0012

metadata.chunk_id: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector__a2-late-chunking__0012
metadata.source_slug: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector
metadata.source_title: IT sector is the strongest grower within the TMT sector

id: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector__a2-late-chunking__0013
text: Technology, Media & Telecom (TMT) is one of the fastest-growing sectors. Helped by the increasing use of software, algorithms and sensors, this sector forms the basis of the digital renewal of other sectors.
